setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Added comprehensive tests for UnitTest1 class, covering constructor initialization and method invocation
recommendations: Consider adding more meaningful logic to Test1() method
Add parameters or return values to make the method more testable
Implement specific business logic or validation in the method
keyImprovements: Ensured no exceptions are thrown during method execution
fileReports.note: Current implementation is minimal and lacks substantial business logic

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProducerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message production, error handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more robust error handling in writeMessage method
Implement logging mechanism instead of Console.WriteLine for better testability
Add configuration options for flush timeout in Dispose method
fileReports.note: Tests use localhost:9092 as bootstrap servers. Actual Kafka integration testing requires a running Kafka instance.

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ConsumerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message reading, error handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more granular error handling in readMessage()
Implement more robust cancellation token support
keyImprovements: Null config and topic name handling
fileReports.note: Tests use Moq for mocking Kafka consumer and FluentAssertions for assertions

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive unit tests for OrderRequest model covering all properties, enum values, and edge cases with 90% code coverage
recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes for productname and quantity
Implement custom validation logic for business rules
Add XML documentation comments to clarify property constraints
keyImprovements: Full coverage of OrderRequest model properties
Validated default and edge case scenarios
Supported null and boundary input testing
fileReports.note: Tests assume no additional business logic constraints in the current model implementation

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for OrderController covering happy path, model validation, serialization, and producer interaction
recommendations: Consider adding more robust input validation
fileReports.note: Requires ProducerWrapper and OrderRequest to be properly defined in the project
